name: Gapper continuation/exhaustion read separates post-read returns (decision-card mechanization)

universe.discovery_source: Polygon v2 grouped daily, adjusted=true (survivorship-free: includes delisted)
universe.ticker_exclusions: non-alphabetic or len>5; 5-letter tickers ending in W/R/U (warrant/right/unit convention); disclosed as approximate
universe.stage1_candidate: prev grouped close exists (no IPO day) AND prev close >= 0.75 USD AND day high >= 1.20 * prev close (BUFFERED superset of the 1.30 stage-2 filter, per advisor: absorbs cross-source basis noise) AND day volume >= 500000 (superset of by-10:30 volume)
universe.boundary_leak_metric: count of final candidates whose Polygon-basis high-gain fell in [1.20,1.35) reported

stage2.source: Alpaca v2 stocks bars, feed=sip (consolidated tape), adjustment=split for BOTH daily and 5Min (probe verified: AAPL 2020-07-10 raw 380.84 vs split 95.21 = 4:1); delisted coverage probe verified (MSW, TBH, LIXT return bars)
stage2.prev_close: last daily bar close strictly before gap day within prior 10 trading days, same source+adjustment
stage2.read_slice: 5-min bars with America/New_York start time in [09:30, 10:25] inclusive (bar starting 10:25 completes at 10:30; zoneinfo per-date handles DST)
stage2.readability_rule: slice must have >= 8 bars AND last slice bar start >= 10:15 ET, else ticker-day excluded as UNREADABLE (halt/sparse); count reported and descriptive outcomes of excluded set disclosed where computable

filters_at_read.pct_up: P >= 1.30 * prev_close where P = close of last slice bar

stage2.entry_origin: OPEN of first bar with ET start in [10:30, 11:00); if absent, excluded as UNREADABLE_AT_ENTRY (counted). Origin bar is disjoint from read-input bars (advisor item 5).
stage2.outcome_end: close of last bar with ET start < 16:00 (naturally handles half-days and halts-into-close)

read_rules.definitions: VWAP = sum(vw*v)/sum(v) over slice; OR = slice bars with start <= 09:55; LH = slice bars with start >= 10:00; up bar: close>open; down bar: close<open; P, H, L = last close / max high / min low of slice

CONT_signals.C2: min(low of LH) >= min(low of OR)  [higher lows intact]
CONT_signals.C3: sum(volume of up bars) > sum(volume of down bars)
CONT_signals.C4: P >= L + 0.5*(H-L)  [upper half of morning range]

EX_signals.E2: max(high of LH) < max(high of OR)  [lower highs]
EX_signals.E3: argmax-volume bar start <= 10:10 AND mean(volume of last 3 slice bars) < 0.5 * max bar volume  [climax then fade]
EX_signals.E4: on the bar containing H: (high - max(open,close)) / (high - low) > 0.6 with range > 0  [rejection wick]

read_rules.vote: CONT if sum(C)>=3 and sum(E)<=1; EX if sum(E)>=3 and sum(C)<=1; else UNC (no call, excluded from test per card)
read_rules.provenance: Frozen mechanization of the card's checklist items computable from bars, locked BEFORE any outcome observed. SPY-relative-strength, key-level, float and catalyst items omitted (no historical source wired) - disclosed.

hypothesis.H0: CONT-read candidates' post-read % move distribution is not greater than EX-read candidates'
hypothesis.min_n: n >= 30 in both CONT and EX, else verdict = UNDERPOWERED
hypothesis.robustness_sample: run-deduped: drop candidate if same ticker had a qualifying candidate within prior 10 trading days (ticker-day non-independence mitigation; advisor item 3)
hypothesis.verdict_rule: VALID_SEPARATION if primary p < 0.05 AND robustness p < 0.10 with same direction; NOT_SIGNIFICANT otherwise; UNDERPOWERED if min_n unmet
secondary_descriptive_only: bucket medians/means incl. UNC and ALL-candidates baseline
cost-free cumulative % paths long-CONT and short-EX

disclosures: Outcomes are raw % moves: no commissions, slippage, borrow cost/availability, or fill modeling. Short-side EX numbers especially optimistic (hard-to-borrow names).
Read is a mechanized proxy of a discretionary process; card items requiring news/level/float context are absent.
Stage-2 coverage may be partial for the most degenerate delisted names despite the delisted probe passing; coverage reported split by active-proxy (ticker still trading in final 10 window days).
Ticker-days are not independent (runners repeat); MWU p-values on the primary sample are anti-conservative - the run-deduped robustness sample is the honest check.
Polygon free-tier discovery uses adjusted daily bars; the +20% buffer absorbs basis noise at the boundary.
No criteria, thresholds, or vote rules may change after outcomes are computed; any post-hoc analysis is labeled post-hoc.
abort_conditions: Stage-1 cache incomplete for the window -> report partial-window truthfully, never extrapolate
Stage-2 usable coverage < 60% of candidates -> verdict capped at DATA_INSUFFICIENT
